google_reviews.text: Evolve Plumbing and Heating Ltd replaced the tap in my en-suite. First class service provided by Iain. Turned up exactly when he said he would and sourced and fitted a replacement tap. Excellent tradesman and really nice, friendly guy. Extremely efficient and very reasonably priced. Have saved Iain's number on my phone for future use. Highly recommend.

Needed a plumber to help sort a leaking valve on mains water supply at my house. Was very easy to contact Iain, and we agreed a late morning appointment. He attended at the time agreed, listened to my description of the issue, inspected the site of the problem. Reported, how he proposed to fix it. He sourced the parts required locally, and fixed the problem. Took some pictures of the repair to show me, as I couldn't access the area to see for myself. He was very prompt, professional, and efficient at every step of the process. The cost of sourcing and purchase, and carrying out the job was very reasonable and fair.  I will not hesitate to contact Evolve Plumbing and Heating ltd, if I ever need a plumber again. Highly recommend this company.

I contacted Iain to fix my kitchen tap. He offered great advice on the type I should be looking at etc - really appreciated this as I had no idea where to start and their is such a wide selection available. He switched over the taps quickly with zero mess! Would highly recommend!!

Had an outdoor tap fitted and I am very happy with the results. Iain was quick to respond and book an appointment, and the work was completed to a high standard - would go to Iain again for any other work I may have
Phoned Iain at 3.30 on Monday about fixing a leaking kitchen mixer tap.....the job was completed before 12 the following morning....Great service and I would definitely recommend 👍🏻
Recently replaced my shower with very reasonable costs and timescales - an easy company to work with.

Excellent service start to finish.  Fast and efficient estimation and a very reasonable quote.  Great communication throughout.  The tradesman were efficient and friendly and very aware of Covid19 social distancing.  Had hot water supplied to our business premises with no complications.  Would highly recommend.

Fantastic service from everyone at Alexander Thomson Plumbing & Heating. Our shower unit stopped working in the morning in one of the guest rooms. We called Alexander Thomson spoke to Angela who as always is very helpful, within half an hour I received an email to say that they had the required replacement shower and arranged to have the unit fitted that afternoon.
Very clean and tidy.
Fantastic

The guy was in our house for 45 minutes doing some electrical work which was done to a very good standard which we were very pleased with. When we got the invoice for payment we were charged for 1.5hrs because apparently you get charged for their travelling time to and from your premises, which was never mentioned when we booked it over the telephone. I have never, ever heard of this being done before!!! So you get charged travelling time to your house, then from your house to their next job. This means that the next person getting something done is being charged for travel time to their home/premises, so in essence that part of it they are charging twice. We were only 4 minutes over the hour because of this but were charged for the half hour. I complained about it and the invoice was changed but not without a lengthy discussion. They need to be more transparent and let customers know exactly what they will be charged for, sorry but I won't use again. Hence why only two stars, no reflection on the work that was done, that was excellent.
I started using this family firm a few years ago and the service was and still is first class, so reliable, quick response, high quality and excellent value for money. Would highly recommend.

Had a constant dripping shower which my insurance did not cover, they put me in touch with Neil who came out to verify my issue, my shower value was gone so three working days later he was back with a new shower for installation. Neil’s very reliable, honest and I will definitely call again if I have any further plumbing work. Highly recommended!

Neil is absolutely fantastic. He has been looking after us for over a year now and is always reliable and quick to get back to us with no problem is too big for him to fix. Brilliant service and an absolute lovely person. Cheers Neil!

Neil fitted an outside tap for us and when there was a problem due to a fault with the product he came very quickly and replaced the tap. We would highly recommend Neil for any plumbing work you need carried out, in fact I have already recomended him to a friend and she too was delighted with the work he carried out for her.

Neil came to repair a leak behind our ceiling.  This was difficult to locate and repair but he did a brilliant job with minimum fuss and a very positive attitude.  A great guy, we would highly recommend.
Neil is fantastic, came when he said, sorted my blocked drain very quickly, guy knows his stuff and just brilliant at what he does.  Would highly recommend!!

business_name: GG Plumbing and Drain Cleaning Ltd

google_reviews.text: I got in contact with Plumb Perfect Plumbing and Drain Cleaning after being let down previously by other plumbers. Within in a day of the first text somebody was out to look at our problems and gave us a quote and date for the work to be completed by. A few days later on the arranged date somebody arrived at the exact time arranged and carried out the works needed. Overall very happy with the service we were provided with and the pricing was very fair too .Would not hesitate to recommend this company to anyone who is having any plumbing/ drain issues.
Had a blocked drain and the team were able to come out the next day to fix it :)
Quick, friendly and professional service.

address: 5 Cantlie Pl, Rosyth, Dunfermline KY11 2HN, UK

google_reviews.text: Gaz and team did a fantastic job and completed 2 x vastly different designs across our 2 x bathrooms.  As the jobs unfolded and we requested a few changes, Gaz and Cole were more than accommodating in fulfilling the requirements. Their work ethic is second to none and the standard of workmanship is meticulous. It was an absolute pleasure having them both here and I would have no hesitation in recommending Brackley Plumbing & Heating to renovate and transform your bathroom.

Tremendous company who did first class work, put up with a wee doggy pest, was very conscientious, courteous, clean, tidy, and friendly.
Highly highly recommend.
Before and after pics =>

Cannot recommend Brackley Plumbing and heating enough. We came back from holiday to no heating and hot water and the news that we needed a new boiler. Gareth was at the house within 24 hours of us getting in touch and 48 hours later we were back up and running.
Great bunch of guys.....very professional, hard working and great to chat too. Will definitely be using them again when we fit the new bathroom.

Gareth has serviced my gas boiler for the last 3 years, and this time I asked him to fix a couple of leaky radiators, replace the flush mechanism in the toilet and re-do the sealant round the shower tray.  All work was carried out quickly and for a reasonable cost.  Gareth and his team are very personable and reliable, which is a big plus for a woman on her own who needs to have tradesmen in the house.  Highly recommended.

Gareth and team have refitted both my bathrooms now. Main bathroom was done 5 years ago and I still love it. Still feels luxurious as the standard of the finish was so good. Wee bathroom completed recently, exactly as I asked for, with a really quick turnaround and at a great price. Gareth has a good eye for design and will do his best to get you what you want within your budget. Wouldn't go past then now. Thanks Gareth!
